raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 36,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "N tas Kehnisch dar-
rihs/ kas winnam pa-
tihk/ un pa-angstina-
sees/ un leelisees prett wiſſu/ kas
Deews irr/ un prett to STIP-
RU DEEWU pahr wiſſem
Deeweem runnahs winſch bruh-
niskas Leetas/ un tam laimefeis/
lthos tahs Duſmibas Babeig-
schanat/ jo tas irr ſtipri no-
spreests/ ka tas ta notiks.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 37,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tawu Tehwu Dee-
wu winſch wehra ne liks/ nedz
Seewu Eekahroſchanu / winſch
arri ne kahdu Deewu eezeenibs/
bet winſch pahr wiſſu pa-augsti-
nasees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 38,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas gohdahs to Dee-
wu Mäusim tawä Namminä/
prohti to Deewu/ ko winna Teh-
wi ne irr pasinnufcht/ gohdahs
winſch ar Seltu / Sudrabu /
dahrgeem Akiniſeem un zittahm
dahrgahm Leetahm.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 39,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un varahdihs teem / kas
tohs Mäusun ar to ſweſchu Dee-
wu winnam ſtiprinahs/ ko
winſch paſiht/ leelu Gohdu/ un
liks tohs pahr daudſeem waldiht/
un iſdalihs to Semmi par
Makfu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 40,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ap to beidſamu Gal-
u baddihs tas Kehnisch no Dee-
nas-Widdus to ar Raggeem /
in tas Kehnisch no Seemeta-
Puffes lauſſees prett winnu ar
Ratteem un Jahtneekeem un
ekahm Laiwahin/ un winſch us
"
    },
    {
      "n": 36,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "tahin Setmmehin nahks/un tohs
pahrpluhdihs un zaur ees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 41,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un winſch nahks us to
mihligu Semmi/ un daudſtaps
nopohſtiti/bet ſchee taps iglahb-
ti no winna Rohkas/ Eedoms
un Moabs/ un to Ammona
Behrnu Birmajee.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 42,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un winſch tawu Spehku
ſuhtihs ug tahm Semmehin / ir
Egiptes-Semme ne iſbehgs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 43,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un winſch waldihs pahr
tahm felta un ſudraba Man-
tahm/ un pahr winſahm mihli-
gahm Egiptes Leetahm / un tee
libiexi un Mohru Laudis win-
nam klauxihs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 44,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet ta Slawa no Rih-
ta-Puffes un Seemeta-Puffes
winnu iſtruhzinahs/ tadeht zel-
jees winſch ar leelu Bahrsibu/
dauds nomaitaht un iſdeldeht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 45,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un winſch uſzels tawas
Teltis ſtarp tahm Juhrabm pee
tahs mihligas Semmes Kalna/
un winnam buhs taws Gals
klaht/ un ne dabbuhs ne kahdu
Paligu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tanni Laika zelſees Mik-
kelis tas leelajs Leels-Kungs/ kas
preeffch tawu Lauschu Behrneem
ſiahw/ un tad buhs tahds beh-
digs Laiks/ tahds wehl ne biis/
kamehr Laudis bijuſchi/ lthos tam
paſchain Laikam. Un tanni Lai-
ka taps tawt Landis iſpeſtiti/
wiſſi/ kas Grahnata ralſtiti
taps atrasti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un dauds no teem/ kas Ja-
Pihtchlds eckch Semmes guls/
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
